programme.title: Welcome to New York
programme.desc: A recovery agent and a designer become part of a big Bollywood event in New York.

programme.title: Raman Raghav 2.0
programme.desc: A serial killer stalks a drug-addicted detective investigating the killer's past crimes.

programme.title: India Lockdown
programme.desc: The lives of four Indians are thrown into turmoil a nationwide lockdown is declared.

programme.title: Lost
programme.desc: A journalist tries to uncover the truth behind the disappearance of a young activist.

programme.title: Rock On 2
programme.desc: The music band members, once separated due to the conflict, reunite and organise a rock concert, but the local authorities oppose them.

programme.title: Dhadak
programme.desc: A young couple's love transcends class and blooms despite their families' disapproval.

programme.title: Mission Majnu
programme.desc: An undercover Indian spy takes on a deadly mission to expose a covert nuclear weapons program in the heart of Pakistan that could destroy the free world.

programme.title: Mrs. Chatterjee vs Norway
programme.desc: An Indian woman fights for justice after Norwegian authorities take her children away.

programme.title: Fitoor
programme.desc: A begum disapproves of the feelings her stable boy, Noor, has for her daughter, Firdaus.

programme.title: Madgaon Express
programme.desc: Childhood friends Dodo, Ayush, and Pinku embark on a trip to Goa that goes completely off-track due to a sequence of terrible decisions.

programme.title: Nh10
programme.desc: Meera and Arjun's road trip turns into a nightmare after they run into a gangster.

programme.title: Tigers : Can a Salesman be a Hero
programme.desc: Ayan stands against his company, who are responsible for the death of many babies.

programme.title: Daas Dev
programme.desc: Dev is the heir to the throne who is challenged by his beloved Paro in his political backyard. Chandni loves Dev, although she knows that her love is unrequited.

programme.title: Kadvi Hawa
programme.desc: A blind old man strikes a deal with a debt collector for his son's survival.

programme.title: Daddy
programme.desc: Arun Gawli becomes one of India's most notable gangsters before he ventures into politics.

programme.title: Love Hostel
programme.desc: Bloodshed ensues when Jyothi and Ashu elope and her family hires a mercenary to kill them.

programme.title: Manikarnika: The Queen of Jhansi
programme.desc: Lakshmibai, the queen of Jhansi, protects the kingdom from the East India Company.

programme.title: Uunchai
programme.desc: Three retired friends trek to the Everest Base Camp as per their dying friend's last wish.

programme.title: Dobaaraa
programme.desc: A thunderstorm facilitates a woman to connect with the past and save a young boy's life.

programme.title: Janhit Mein Jaari
programme.desc: With the will to break taboo as her armour, Mannu embarks to work as a condom salesperson.

programme.title: Mr. & Mrs. Mahi
programme.desc: A failed cricketer notices his wife's natural skill for the sport and starts coaching her.

programme.title: English Vinglish
programme.desc: While taking a spoken English crash course in New York, a mild-mannered Indian housewife develops a stronger personality and builds several meaningful friendships.

programme.title: 99 Songs
programme.desc: A musician must compose 100 songs in order to reunite with his lover. However, his journey of heartbreak, redemption, loss and faith allows him to discover much more than love.

programme.title: Crazy Singh
programme.desc: Bittu, a village simpleton, falls in love with a modern Saumya. Chaos ensues when their contrasting families meet to fix their marriage.

programme.title: Paheli
programme.desc: A ghost falls in love with a newly-wed woman and disguises himself as her husband when her spouse goes away for business.

programme.title: Drona
programme.desc: Aditya is an orphaned and lonely young man. He soon learns that he belongs to a family of ancestral warriors who guard a mystic source of cosmic energy, and he must now take up his responsibilities.

programme.title: Yuva
programme.desc: The lives of Michael, Arjun and Lallan collide when they are caught in a web of criminal conspiracies during the changing political scenario in Kolkata.

programme.title: Love Aaj Kal
programme.desc: In a technology-driven world where love is on speed-dial, two lovers find themselves overcoming distances, failures and heartbreaks to find each other again and preserve the love they had abandoned.

programme.title: 777 Charlie
programme.desc: Dharma, a broken man drowning in despair, finds his world transformed when he rescues Charlie, an abused pup. Later, they embark on a journey of hope and redemption.

programme.title: Golmaal 3
programme.desc: Cupid strikes when Pritam, a single father, comes across his college sweetheart, Geeta, in Goa. However, when their respective children go at war with each other, the two find it difficult to reunite.

programme.title: The Family Star
programme.desc: A hardworking middle-class man, who takes his family responsibilities very seriously, meets a research student renting his penthouse named Indu, who changes his life.

programme.title: Boo
programme.desc: Four friends are captivated by a horror novel during Halloween. However, reality becomes hazy as they read it, and they must confront the apparitional threat that manifests.

programme.title: Lucknow Central
programme.desc: Kishen, an inmate in a Lucknow jail, yearns to be set free. When he learns that a few prisoners must form a band, he sees it as his ticket to freedom.

programme.title: Bol
programme.desc: The patriarch of a religious Muslim family refuses to accept his transgender son, which creates a conflict within the family and ends up tearing them apart.

programme.title: Kannum Kannum Kollaiyadithaal
programme.desc: Siddharth and Kalli never seem to be short on money. However, when they meet the women of their dreams, they are pushed into reconsidering their career choices.

programme.title: Dus
programme.desc: Jamwaal, a terrorist, plans to wreak havoc in Canada when the Indian Prime Minister visits the nation. A team of special agents from India are sent to catch the terrorist.

programme.title: F2: Fun and Frustration
programme.desc: Two young men dream of controlling their wives after marriage, but their chauvinistic mindset backfires, leading to a series of hilarious and troublesome situations.

programme.title: Dhruva
programme.desc: A committed police officer, Dhruva, uncovers a web of organised crime headed by a scientist, Siddharth Abhimanyu. But when Dhruva tries to build a case against him, he faces many challenges.

programme.title: Andhadhun
programme.desc: Akash, a piano player pretending to be visually-impaired, unwittingly becomes entangled in a number of problems as he witnesses the murder of a former film actor.

programme.title: Raththam
programme.desc: While investigating his friend's murder, Ranjith, a journalist, unearths the sinister network responsible for a series of crimes.

programme.title: Munjya
programme.desc: Bittu awakens Munjya, a fearsome spirit with an insatiable desire for marriage, who relentlessly hunts him down in a chilling pursuit.

programme.title: Sanga Thamizhan
programme.desc: Murugan, a happy-go-lucky young man, falls in love with the daughter of Sanjay, an industrialist. However, trouble arises when Sanjay notices that Murugan looks like a figure from his dark past.

programme.title: Hundred
programme.desc: The Phoenix face London Spirit, who have David Warner and Ashton Turner in their ranks. Both teams need a win to stay in the play-offs hunt.

programme.title: The Hundred Mini
programme.desc: Joe Root's Trent Rockets face a tough test against a powerful Southern Brave squad that includes Australian Hilton Cartwright.

programme.title: The Hundred Women's Mini
programme.desc: League leaders Southern Brave face the Trent Rockets. Australian Ash Gardner and Alana King will look for a key victory at Trent Bridge.

programme.title: T20 AUS v SA
programme.desc: Game 2: With Tim David's fantastic performance securing a 1-0 series lead, Australia now aims to extend its winning streak to 10 consecutive T20 victories.

programme.title: T20 AUS v SA
programme.desc: Mitchell Marsh’s Australia faces a series-decider clash in Cairns after a Brevis-inspired South Africa leveled the series.

programme.title: CPL
programme.desc: Game 5: The Kings and their captain Matthew Forde travel to North Sound. The home side will hope for another strong showing from their star-studded line up.

programme.title: The Hundred Women's Mini
programme.desc: Ellyse Perry's Birmingham Phoenix, with a dominant record over London Spirit, aim to continue their winning ways at Edgbaston.

programme.title: The Hundred Mini
programme.desc: The Phoenix face London Spirit, who have David Warner and Ashton Turner in their ranks. Both teams need a win to stay in the play-offs hunt.

programme.title: T20 AUS v SA
programme.desc: Mitchell Marsh’s Australia faces a series-decider clash in Cairns after a Brevis-inspired South Africa leveled the series.

programme.title: The Hundred Mini
programme.desc: The Northern Superchargers take on the Manchester Originals in a crucial north-west derby.

programme.title: T20 Mini AUS v SA
programme.desc: Mitchell Marsh’s Australia faces a series-decider clash in Cairns after a Brevis-inspired South Africa leveled the series.

programme.title: The Hundred Women's Mini
programme.desc: Beth Mooney leads the Originals against Superchargers with Annabel Sutherland. The Superchargers will look to continue their impressive form.

programme.title: The Hundred Mini
programme.desc: Joe Root's Trent Rockets face a tough test against a powerful Southern Brave squad that includes Australian Hilton Cartwright.

programme.title: The Hundred Mini
programme.desc: All eyes will be on Steve Smith as his Welsh Fire travels to The Oval to face the defending champions, Oval Invincibles.

programme.title: The Hundred Mini
programme.desc: The Northern Superchargers take on the Manchester Originals in a crucial north-west derby.

programme.title: The Hundred Mini
programme.desc: The Phoenix face London Spirit, who have David Warner and Ashton Turner in their ranks. Both teams need a win to stay in the play-offs hunt.

programme.title: T20 Mini AUS v SA
programme.desc: Mitchell Marsh’s Australia faces a series-decider clash in Cairns after a Brevis-inspired South Africa leveled the series.

programme.title: The Hundred Women's Mini
programme.desc: Ellyse Perry's Birmingham Phoenix, with a dominant record over London Spirit, aim to continue their winning ways at Edgbaston.

programme.title: T20 AUS v SA
programme.desc: Australia's impressive lineup gets even better with the return of Travis Head and Josh Hazlewood, while South Africa aims for an upset in Darwin.

programme.desc: Game 2: With Tim David's fantastic performance securing a 1-0 series lead, Australia now aims to extend its winning streak to 10 consecutive T20 victories.

programme.desc: Ellyse Perry's Birmingham Phoenix, with a dominant record over London Spirit, aim to continue their winning ways at Edgbaston.

programme.title: Hundred W
programme.desc: Defending champions Southern Brave face the Oval Invincibles. Meg Lanning and Amanda-Jade Wellington will try to disrupt their charge.

programme.title: Hundred
programme.desc: Two of the competition's top teams clash. Jofra Archer's Southern Brave will try to overcome the defending champs, Oval Invincibles.

programme.desc: The Northern Superchargers take on the Manchester Originals in a crucial north-west derby.

programme.desc: Beth Mooney leads the Originals against Superchargers with Annabel Sutherland. The Superchargers will look to continue their impressive form.

programme.title: ODI Thrillers
programme.desc: We open the Fox Cricket vault and look back at some of the greatest ODI matches from Australian soil.

programme.title: ODI Thrillers
programme.desc: 1-0 down and the series in the balance, a stunning century from Adam Gilchrist creates drama as Australia takes on South Africa at the SCG.

programme.title: ODI Thrillers
programme.desc: We open the Fox Cricket vault and look back at some of the greatest ODI matches from Australian soil.

programme.title: The Hundred Mini
programme.desc: Two of the competition's top teams clash in a potential final preview. Jofra Archer's Southern Brave will try to overcome the defending champions, Oval Invincibles.

programme.title: Pre Game
programme.desc: Don't miss a moment of the Australia vs. South Africa series. The best team in cricket has all the highlights, previews, and analysis.

programme.title: ODI AUS v SA
programme.desc: Mitchell Marsh leads Australia's one-day side against a new-look South Africa in Cairns for the first of three ODIs.

programme.title: The Big Break
programme.desc: The game may be taking a break, but we're not. Keep watching for exclusive interviews, an analysis of team strategies, highlights, and more.

programme.title: ODI AUS v SA
programme.desc: Mitchell Marsh leads Australia's one-day side against a new-look South Africa in Cairns for the first of three ODIs.

programme.title: Post Game
programme.desc: Join the Fox Cricket team for the best review from the day of cricket with this Post Game show.

programme.title: The Hundred Mini
programme.desc: The Phoenix face London Spirit, who have David Warner and Ashton Turner in their ranks. Both teams need a win to stay in the play-offs hunt.

programme.title: The Hundred Women's Mini
programme.desc: Ellyse Perry's Birmingham Phoenix, with a dominant record over London Spirit, aim to continue their winning ways at Edgbaston.

programme.title: The Hundred Mini
programme.desc: The Phoenix face London Spirit, who have David Warner and Ashton Turner in their ranks. Both teams need a win to stay in the play-offs hunt.

programme.title: ODI AUS v SA
programme.desc: Mitchell Marsh leads Australia's one-day side against a new-look South Africa in Cairns for the first of three ODIs.

programme.title: Hundred W
programme.desc: Ash Gardner and Alana King will lead the Rockets against Originals, who have a lineup including Australians Beth Mooney and Sophie Ecclestone.

programme.title: Ashes Greats: Gilchrist 2001
programme.desc: Remember some of the most incredible individual performances in Ashes history. Here, a look at Adam Gilchrist's excellent performances with the bat in the 2001 series.

programme.title: The Hundred
programme.desc: With just one win to their name so far this season, Jos Buttler's Manchester Originals take on Northern Superchargers in the Men's Hundred at Old Trafford.

programme.title: The Hundred
programme.desc: As the Women's Hundred continues to hot up, Beth Mooney's Manchester Originals search for a second consecutive win in a clash with Northern Superchargers at Old Trafford.

programme.title: THE HUNDRED Men's - M14 Hlts
programme.desc: Birmingham Phoenix go to Leeds in pursuit of some momentum as Liam Livingstone's side take on the Superchargers and Graham Clark, who performed final-ball heroics last time out. (15.08)

programme.title: THE HUNDRED Men's - M16 Hlts
programme.desc: Having waved goodbye to their unbeaten record, the back-to-back champions look to avoid back-to-back defeats as Oval Invincibles face the Fire's Steve Smith and Jonny Bairstow. (16.08)

programme.title: THE HUNDRED Women's - M16 Hlts
programme.desc: Downing Birmingham for the Invincibles' first win of the campaign, can Alice Capsey inspire the Invincibles once more in a Women's Hundred contest at the Oval against Welsh Fire? (16.08)

programme.title: THE HUNDRED Men's - M18 Hlts
programme.desc: In the Men's Hundred, Birmingham Phoenix compete with London Spirit. England red-ball star Jamie Smith came to the fore with a knock of 52 in Sprit's latest win. (17.08)

programme.title: THE HUNDRED Women's - M18 Hlts
programme.desc: In the Women's Hundred, Birmingham Phoenix face Charlie Dean's London Spirit, who lost their first game in four to a Nat Sciver-Brunt-inspired Trent Rockets. (17.08)

programme.title: The Hundred
programme.desc: In the Men's Hundred, Birmingham Phoenix compete with London Spirit. England red-ball star Jamie Smith came to the fore with a knock of 52 in Sprit's latest win.

programme.title: THE HUNDRED Women's - M7 Hlts
programme.desc: In the Women's Hundred, Georgia Adams' Southern Brave - who got off to a winning start in their opening game - compete with Ellyse Perry's Birmingham Phoenix in Southampton. (10.08)

programme.title: THE HUNDRED Women's - M18 Hlts
programme.desc: In the Women's Hundred, Birmingham Phoenix face Charlie Dean's London Spirit, who lost their first game in four to a Nat Sciver-Brunt-inspired Trent Rockets. (17.08)

programme.title: THE HUNDRED Men's - M17 Hlts
programme.desc: With just one win to their name so far this season, Jos Buttler's Manchester Originals take on Northern Superchargers in the Men's Hundred at Old Trafford. (17.08)

programme.desc: In the Women's Hundred, Southern Brave take on Oval Invincibles.

programme.title: THE HUNDRED Men's - M11 Hlts
programme.desc: Off to the perfect start in 2025, last year's runners-up Southern Brave - skippered by James Vince - take on Harry Brook's Northern Superchargers in Southampton at the Rose Bowl. (13.08)

programme.title: Live The Hundred
programme.desc: In the Women's Hundred, Trent Rockets meet Manchester Originals.

programme.title: Live The Hundred
programme.desc: In the Men's Hundred, Trent Rockets host Manchester Originals.

programme.title: THE HUNDRED Men's - M20 Hlts

programme.title: The Hundred
programme.desc: In the Women's Hundred, Trent Rockets meet Manchester Originals.

programme.title: Phir Aayi Hasseen Dillruba
programme.desc: Rani and Rishu try to flee the country in order to evade the police trying the investigate their troubled past. Left with no options, Rani decides to ask a gentle-mannered suitor for help.

programme.title: Kahani Mein Twist
programme.desc: A tribal man, bound by tradition, arrives in the city to kidnap his betrothed. He incidentally also meets the girl's lover who, after realising his intentions, sets out to rescue her.

programme.title: Extraaa Storiez
programme.desc: The host presents various snippets and information regarding 'PK' to highlight the shooting experiences of cast and crew.

programme.title: Teleshopping
programme.desc: The host showcases the features of a variety of products manufactured by renowned brands that can be purchased from the comfort of one's home.

programme.title: Teleshopping
programme.desc: The host showcases the features of a variety of products manufactured by renowned brands that can be purchased from the comfort of one's home.

programme.title: Movie
programme.desc: This is TV Show - Entertainment Category

programme.title: Movie
programme.desc: This is TV Show - Entertainment Category

programme.title: Humraaz
programme.desc: A wealthy Raj Singhania begins an affair with Priya, an entertainer who already has a boyfriend. While they start their relationship, Priya's lover decides to get his revenge on them.

programme.title: Filler
programme.desc: Filler

programme.title: A Gentleman: Sundar, Susheel, Risky
programme.desc: Gaurav, a young man living in Miami, USA, wishes to settle down and marry his girlfriend. However, his plans are put on hold when he travels to Mumbai and is mistaken for a spy.

programme.title: Bala
programme.desc: Bala, a young man, suffers from premature balding and struggles to measure up to social beauty standards. When his insecurity threatens his marriage, he seeks the help of a dark-complexioned lawyer.

programme.title: Shivaay
programme.desc: Shivaay, an Indian mountaineer, goes to Bulgaria with his daughter Gaura to meet his wife. However, chaos ensues when a child trafficking gang kidnaps Gaura, and Shivaay must do his best to save her.

programme.title: Madam Chief Minister
programme.desc: Tara, a woman from lower caste, aims at bringing a change in her community. So, she faces several challenges and eventually becomes the chief minister of Uttar Pradesh.

programme.title: Tashan
programme.desc: A game of cat and mouse ensues when four unique people from different backgrounds leave on a fateful journey to find a suitcase containing INR 25 crores, which has been stolen from a gangster.

programme.title: Bhavesh Joshi Superhero
programme.desc: Sikander is a young man who becomes a masked vigilante to avenge his friend's murder. However, what begins as a revenge mission, soon turns into an innate desire to end corruption and the mafia rule.

programme.title: Indoo Ki Jawani
programme.desc: Indoo's one-night stand plans hit a snag after she discovers her charming partner's nationality and starts suspecting him of being a wanted terrorist.

programme.title: Tezz
programme.desc: Aakash plots a terrorist attack on a train in London. Arjun, a counter-terrorism officer on the brink of retirement, tries to negotiate with Aakash, while secretly trying to find his location.

programme.title: C Kkompany
programme.desc: Three friends form a fake extortion gang to quell their financial problems. However, the secretive company gains fame overnight and finds itself getting entrusted by a large number of callers.

programme.title: Charitraheen
programme.desc: Destiny separates two lovers, Inder and Rama, and Inder marries Kamala. However, events take an unprecedented turn when Inder and Rama cross paths again years later.

programme.title: Movie
programme.desc: Movie

programme.title: Movie
programme.desc: Movie

programme.title: Movie
programme.desc: Movie

programme.title: Movie
programme.desc: Movie

programme.title: Movie
programme.desc: Movie

programme.title: Movie
programme.desc: Movie

programme.title: Raid
programme.desc: Prabhakaran, a man from Chennai, takes an oath to eradicate wrongdoers in society. However. he faces many struggles and problems from his enemies.

programme.title: Aakhree Raasta
programme.desc: An ex-convict is bent on revenge against the people responsible for his wrongful imprisonment but is pit against his estranged son who is now a police officer.

programme.title: Flight
programme.desc: Multi-millionaire Ranveer Malhotra goes against all odds and takes on some life-threatening obstacles in a bid for survival on an aeroplane after his manufacturing company deals with a massive fiasco.

programme.title: Chup
programme.desc: Inspector General Arvind Mathur investigates the deaths and mutilations of multiple film critics in Mumbai. Soon, he begins to deduce that the culprit is killing his victims due to their reviews.

programme.title: Nanhe Jaisalmer
programme.desc: Nanhe, a tourist guide in Jaisalmer, is obsessed with his favourite actor, Bobby Deol. His dreams turn into reality when he learns that Bobby is visiting his city for a film shoot.

programme.title: Santa Banta Pvt. Ltd.
programme.desc: Passed off as spies, two inept pals are sent to Fiji to rescue a kidnapped bureaucrat. Soon enough, they're creating more problems than they're solving.

programme.title: Udta Punjab
programme.desc: A story that revolves around drug abuse in the affluent north Indian State of Punjab and how the youth there have succumbed to it en-masse resulting in a socio-economic decline.

programme.title: Kedarnath
programme.desc: Mansoor, a reserved Muslim porter, falls in love with Mukku, the beautiful and rebellious daughter of a Hindu priest. But their love is put to the test amid misunderstandings and nature's wrath.

programme.title: Chup
programme.desc: Inspector General Arvind Mathur investigates the deaths and mutilations of multiple film critics in Mumbai. Soon, he begins to deduce that the culprit is killing his victims due to their reviews.

programme.title: Nanhe Jaisalmer
programme.desc: Nanhe, a tourist guide in Jaisalmer, is obsessed with his favourite actor, Bobby Deol. His dreams turn into reality when he learns that Bobby is visiting his city for a film shoot.

programme.title: Santa Banta Pvt. Ltd.
programme.desc: Passed off as spies, two inept pals are sent to Fiji to rescue a kidnapped bureaucrat. Soon enough, they're creating more problems than they're solving.

programme.title: Udta Punjab
programme.desc: A story that revolves around drug abuse in the affluent north Indian State of Punjab and how the youth there have succumbed to it en-masse resulting in a socio-economic decline.

programme.title: Kedarnath
programme.desc: Mansoor, a reserved Muslim porter, falls in love with Mukku, the beautiful and rebellious daughter of a Hindu priest. But their love is put to the test amid misunderstandings and nature's wrath.

programme.title: Krrish 3
programme.desc: Krrish and his father must defeat human-animal mutants created by an evil genius, Kaal, who is hell-bent on destroying the world. His vile army is led by a chameleon mutant, Kaya.

programme.title: Shaadi Mein Zaroor Aana
programme.desc: Satyendra and Aarti meet for an arranged marriage and fall in love. Things go downhill when she runs away on their wedding day to pursue her career.

programme.title: Double Dhamaal
programme.desc: Four idlers make elaborate plans to earn money by investing in buildings but are conned by Kabir, who leaves them unemployed and penniless. Soon, they are on the prowl to avenge their humiliation.

programme.title: Vasudha
programme.desc: Though they have different perspectives, the amiable and endearing Vasudha works as a housekeeper in Chandrika, a business tycoon's house. S01 E295.

programme.title: Ek Nazar
programme.desc: Ek Nazar

programme.title: Kumkum Bhagya
programme.desc: Pragya and Abhi find their lives entwined in a cruel twist of fate. However, despite their initial aversion towards one another, they fall in love and fight to be together against all odds. S01 E3157.

programme.title: Ek Nazar
programme.desc: Ek Nazar

programme.title: Jamai No. 1
programme.desc: A devoted son-in-law navigates the complexities of married life in an attempt to maintain a balance in the family dynamics of his wife's household. S01 E237.

programme.title: Jagriti - Ek Nayi Subah
programme.desc: A young girl raises her voice against the prejudices leading to unfair societal conventions of labelling her community as undesirables. S01 E338.

programme.title: Vasudha
programme.desc: Though they have different perspectives, the amiable and endearing Vasudha works as a housekeeper in Chandrika, a business tycoon's house. S01 E10.

programme.desc: A young girl raises her voice against the prejudices leading to unfair societal conventions of labelling her community as undesirables. S01 E338.

programme.title: Jaane Anjaane Hum Mile
programme.desc: Reet, a career-oriented woman, finds it difficult to deal with the societal pressures of marriage alongside navigating her life as a journalist. S01 E252.

programme.title: Saru
programme.desc: A kabaddi player with aspirations of becoming a district commissioner leaves Rajasthan for Mumbai to attend college, balancing her ambitions while fighting for her mother's rightful family status. S01 E96.

programme.desc: Though they have different perspectives, the amiable and endearing Vasudha works as a housekeeper in Chandrika, a business tycoon's house. S01 E10.

programme.desc: Famous female celebrities and television personalities leave their luxurious lifestyles and modern comforts behind to experience rural life and the challenges it brings in an Indian village. S01 E15.

programme.title: Ek Nazar
programme.desc: Ek Nazar

programme.title: Jagriti - Ek Nayi Subah
programme.desc: Everyone is shocked as Sapna informs them that her baby's father is Suraj but he refutes the allegation and later Jagriti has a private conversation with Sapna. S01 E311.

programme.title: Vasudha
programme.desc: As her scheme foils, Megha unwillingly expresses an apology to Vasudha at Chandrika's insistence. Later, Madhav feigns attacking Vasudha in front of Megha and afterwards apprises her of his situation. S01 E269.

programme.title: Ek Nazar
programme.desc: Ek Nazar

programme.title: Kumkum Bhagya
programme.desc: The assailants discover Prarthana and Shivansh's hiding spot and attempt to murder them. In the meantime, Smita feels emotional about Shivansh but Payal encourages her to exit the hospital. S01 E3132.

programme.title: Ek Nazar
programme.desc: Ek Nazar

programme.title: Jamai No. 1
programme.desc: A son-in-law starts staying at his wife's parental home and tries to solve the issues persistent in the latter's family and creates strong bonds. S01 E211.

programme.title: Jagriti - Ek Nayi Subah
programme.desc: Everyone is shocked as Sapna informs them that her baby's father is Suraj but he refutes the allegation and later Jagriti has a private conversation with Sapna. S01 E311.

programme.title: Tum Se Tum Tak
programme.desc: Anu and Vipin's engagement news shocks Aryavardhan and Jhende helps him understand that he has developed feelings for Anu while also advising him against it. S01 E15.

programme.title: Kumkum Bhagya
programme.desc: The assailants discover Prarthana and Shivansh's hiding spot and attempt to murder them. In the meantime, Smita feels emotional about Shivansh but Payal encourages her to exit the hospital. S01 E3132.

programme.desc: Everyone is shocked as Sapna informs them that her baby's father is Suraj but he refutes the allegation and later Jagriti has a private conversation with Sapna. S01 E311.

programme.title: Jaane Anjaane Hum Mile
programme.desc: Viren comes looking for vengeance against Reet and Anuradha apprises Dhruv of Unnati's wrongdoing. Later, resolved to seek justice for Anmol, Reet implores Unnati to turn herself in. S01 E226.

programme.desc: A kabaddi player with aspirations of becoming a district commissioner leaves Rajasthan for Mumbai to attend college, balancing her ambitions while fighting for her mother's rightful family status. S01 E69.

programme.title: Jaane Anjaane Hum Mile
programme.desc: Viren comes looking for vengeance against Reet and Anuradha apprises Dhruv of Unnati's wrongdoing. Later, resolved to seek justice for Anmol, Reet implores Unnati to turn herself in. S01 E226.

programme.title: Ek Nazar
programme.desc: Ek Nazar

programme.title: Vasudha
programme.desc: As her scheme foils, Megha unwillingly expresses an apology to Vasudha at Chandrika's insistence. Later, Madhav feigns attacking Vasudha in front of Megha and afterwards apprises her of his situation. S01 E269.

programme.title: Saru
programme.desc: Kamini, adamant on Ved and Anika's marriage, advises Anika to upload Rachna's video when Tara refuses to meet their demands. Meanwhile, Saru chases after Ved to save him. S01 E70.

programme.title: Jagriti - Ek Nayi Subah
programme.desc: Akash discovers that Sapna is expecting Sooraj's baby and accuses Sooraj. When Jagriti interrogates Akash, he displays his medical report and reveals a shocking news. S01 E312.

programme.title: Tum Se Tum Tak
programme.desc: Meera yells at Anu, claiming she lied about her marital status in the form. Meanwhile, Pushpa happily informs Gopal about the fridge but he fumes at Raghupati and rejects his proposal for Anu. S01 E16.

programme.title: Kumkum Bhagya
programme.desc: As Prarthana comes out to help a nurse, a sniper traps Shivansh and Prarthana just before unexpected assistance shows up. S01 E3133.

programme.title: Jaane Anjaane Hum Mile
programme.desc: As Raghav accepts responsibility for Unnati's offense, Reet resolves to uncover proof against her. The following day, Reet receives a shocking news. S01 E227.

programme.title: Vasudha
programme.desc: Madhav apprises Vasudha of his situation and reveals the whole truth about Megha. Later, Megha and Karishma scheme to exploit Madhav. S01 E270.

programme.title: Ek Nazar
programme.desc: Ek Nazar

programme.title: Vasudha
programme.desc: Though they have different perspectives, the amiable and endearing Vasudha works as a housekeeper in Chandrika, a business tycoon's house. S01 E11.

programme.title: Jamai No. 1
programme.desc: Neel decides to confront Kanchan and asks her why she killed Uma. Later, during their conversation, Riddhi makes an entry. S01 E212.

programme.title: Ek Nazar
programme.desc: Ek Nazar

programme.title: Jamai No. 1
programme.desc: A devoted son-in-law navigates the complexities of married life in an attempt to maintain a balance in the family dynamics of his wife's household. S01 E07.

programme.desc: Kamini, adamant on Ved and Anika's marriage, advises Anika to upload Rachna's video when Tara refuses to meet their demands. Meanwhile, Saru chases after Ved to save him. S01 E70.

programme.desc: Akash discovers that Sapna is expecting Sooraj's baby and accuses Sooraj. When Jagriti interrogates Akash, he displays his medical report and reveals a shocking news. S01 E312.

programme.desc: Ek Nazar
